items.title: Sources: Knicks' Robinson to play after surgery
items.summary: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson has undergone surgery on his broken right pinkie finger and plans to play in Game 1 of the NBA Finals while wearing a brace on his hand, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Spurs roll past Thunder as WCF head to Game 7
items.summary: With the Spurs facing elimination, Victor Wembanyama led the charge with 28 points and 10 rebounds in a 118-91 blowout of the Thunder to send the Western Conference finals to a Game 7.

items.title: Williams ineffective in return, SGA off in OKC los...
items.summary: Jalen Williams scored only one point in his return from a hamstring strain, and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finished with less than half his regular-season average as the Thunder dropped Game 6 to the Spurs.

items.title: Prosecutors allege Rozier agreed to $100K bribe
items.summary: Federal prosecutors allege Terry Rozier agreed to a $100,000 bribe in order to manipulate his performance in an NBA game as part of a gambling scheme and filed two new charges against him Thursday.

items.title: Sources: Hawks GM Saleh gets promotion, deal
items.summary: The Hawks signed Onsi Saleh to a long-term contract extension and promoted him from general manager to president of basketball operations, it was announced on Wednesday.

items.title: Source: Lakers lay off over a dozen amid reorg
items.summary: The Lakers informed more than a dozen employees Wednesday they were being laid off as part of a reorganization under new franchise leadership, a source familiar with the situation told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: NBA's BOG passes anti-tanking changes
items.summary: The NBA's board of governors voted overwhelmingly Thursday to change the league's draft lottery format, including expanding from 14 to 16 teams, as well as anti-tanking measures, the league announced.

items.title: Trump plans to attend NBA Finals game at MSG
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he is planning on attending an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next month.

items.title: 👶 Tyrese Maxey, Myra Gordon introduce baby
